title: POST /books requires year and isbn, stricter than the spec
evidence: src/app.ts:32-37 rejects requests missing year or isbn with 400; TASK.md/R9 only mandates title and author as required
suggestion: Treat year/isbn as optional (or document the stricter contract) so valid title+author-only creates are not rejected

title: ?author= filter is exact, case-sensitive equality
suggestion: Consider LIKE/normalized matching if partial or case-insensitive author search is desired; spec is satisfied as-is

title: Line coverage ~78% (test_coverage=0.7837)
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.7837; the 500 error-handler middleware (src/app.ts:154-157) and DB close/shutdown paths are unexercised
suggestion: Add a test that forces a DB error to cover the 500 branch; informational only — build and all 17 tests pass (defect_rate=1.0)
